commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch makes embedded PI skip-discovery model resolution try bundled static catalog rows before dynamic provider hooks, opts runEmbeddedPiAgent into that fallback, and adds static-row/provider-normalization coverage.

PR surface: Source +13, Tests +46. Total +59 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: no. live Discord/Moonshot reproduction was run in this read-only pass. The linked issue includes model-resolution timing logs, and current main source shows the skip-PI path still attempts dynamic provider resolution before static fallback.
commands.review_followup: A narrow mechanical repair remains on the PR branch: remove the no-op compat spread fallback in the new test and rerun focused validation.

target.title: fix(agent): use static catalog for PI model fast path
target.author: leno23
